plan_under_test: Foreign mark-scheme text labels are limited to known question numbers for that paper.
tests_added_or_changed: Extend the text-label fixture with known q7/q9 records for 13winter11 and a 90 (x) line inside q10 text that should be ignored.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, 90 (x) will be reported as a foreign label.
what_passing_proves: The filter preserves known neighboring-question detections and drops unknown numeric expression labels.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not classify every possible false-positive OCR shape.
It does not validate image pixels.
risk_of_bad_tests: Low. The fixture explicitly controls the known question numbers for the paper.
